subtitle: 尤运宁
headline:
iOS Developer & DevOps Engineer
Wuhan Rural Commercial Bank · IT Department
bioMarkdown:
Hi, I'm Yunning👋. iOS Developer & DevOps Engineer based in Wuhan, China.

I hold an M.S. in Computer Technology from China University of Geosciences (Wuhan), where I published 3 SCI Q1 papers. Currently working at Wuhan Rural Commercial Bank as a DevOps Engineer, while actively building iOS apps including NanoPineapple and EasyResume from the ground up.

Previously interned at Tencent and Yonyou, with solid full-stack capabilities in Java backend and iOS development.

🔬 **Focus:** iOS Development, SwiftUI/UIKit, DevOps & Monitoring.
blogTagline: Thoughts on AI, software, life and more. Short notes and longer write-ups.
